     func quit() {
+        clipboardDismissTask?.cancel()
+        overlayPresenter.dismiss()
+        hotkeyMonitor.stop()
         NSApp.terminate(nil)
     }
+
+    private func processHotkeyEffect(_ effect: HotkeyEffect) async {
+        switch effect {
+        case .start:
+            startRecording()
+        case .stop:
+            await stopRecording()
+        case .restart:
+            break
+        }
+    }
+
+    private func startRecording() {
+        guard status == .ready, hotkeyMonitor.isRunning, speechModelManager.phase == .ready else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        let trace = traceBuilder.makeTrace()
+        activeTrace = trace
+
+        guard pipelineGate.acquire(.liveRecording) else {
+            trace.abandon()
+            activeTrace = nil
+            print("Skipped recording start because the pipeline is busy.")
+            return
+        }
+
+        do {
+            try audioRecorder.startRecording { _ in
+            }
+        } catch {
+            pipelineGate.release(.liveRecording)
+            trace.abandon()
+            activeTrace = nil
+            overlayPresenter.dismiss()
+            showError(error.localizedDescription)
+            return
+        }
+
+        trace.markMicrophoneLive()
+        clipboardDismissTask?.cancel()
+        if settingsStore.playSounds {
+            soundPlayer.play(.startRecording)
+        }
+        overlayPresenter.show(.recording)
+        status = .recording
+    }
+
+    private func stopRecording() async {
+        guard audioRecorder.isRecording else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        activeTrace?.markHotkeyLifted()
+        activeTrace?.markMicrophoneCold()
+        if settingsStore.playSounds {
+            soundPlayer.play(.stopRecording)
+        }
+        overlayPresenter.show(.transcribing)
+        status = .transcribing
+        activeTrace?.markTranscriptionStart()
+
+        let samples = await audioRecorder.stopRecording()
+        let transcription = await speechTranscriber.transcribe(
+            samples: samples,
+            modelID: settingsStore.speechModelID
+        )
+
+        if let transcription, !transcription.isEmpty {
+            clipboardWriter.write(transcription)
+            activeTrace?.markPasteEnd()
+            overlayPresenter.show(.copiedToClipboard)
+            scheduleClipboardDismiss()
+        } else {
+            overlayPresenter.dismiss()
+        }
+
+        pipelineGate.release(.liveRecording)
+        activeTrace = nil
+        markReady()
+    }
+
+    private func scheduleClipboardDismiss() {
+        clipboardDismissTask?.cancel()
+        clipboardDismissTask = Task { @MainActor [weak self] in
+            try? await Task.sleep(for: .milliseconds(2500))
+            self?.overlayPresenter.dismiss(ifShowing: .copiedToClipboard)
+        }
+    }
 }

@@ -0,0 +1,220 @@
+@preconcurrency import AVFoundation
+import Foundation
+
+typealias AudioChunkHandler = @Sendable ([Float]) -> Void
+
+protocol AudioRecording: AnyObject, Sendable {
+    var isRecording: Bool { get }
+    func startRecording(onChunk: @escaping AudioChunkHandler) throws
+    func stopRecording() async -> [Float]
+}
+
+enum AudioRecordingError: LocalizedError {
+    case noInputAvailable
+    case converterCreationFailed
+
+    var errorDescription: String? {
+        switch self {
+        case .noInputAvailable:
+            return "No input device is available for recording."
+        case .converterCreationFailed:
+            return "The recording format converter could not be created."
+        }
+    }
+}
+
+final class AudioSampleAccumulator {
+    private var samples: [Float] = []
+    private let lock = NSLock()
+
+    func clear() {
+        lock.lock()
+        defer { lock.unlock() }
+        samples.removeAll(keepingCapacity: true)
+    }
+
+    func append(_ chunk: [Float]) {
+        guard !chunk.isEmpty else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        lock.lock()
+        defer { lock.unlock() }
+        samples.append(contentsOf: chunk)
+    }
+
+    func snapshot() -> [Float] {
+        lock.lock()
+        defer { lock.unlock() }
+        return samples
+    }
+}
+
+final class LiveAudioRecorder: AudioRecording, @unchecked Sendable {
+    private static let targetFormat = AVAudioFormat(
+        commonFormat: .pcmFormatFloat32,
+        sampleRate: 16_000,
+        channels: 1,
+        interleaved: false
+    )!
+
+    private let engine: AVAudioEngine
+    private let accumulator: AudioSampleAccumulator
+    private let stateLock = NSLock()
+
+    private var converter: AVAudioConverter?
+    private var inputFormat: AVAudioFormat?
+    private var chunkHandler: AudioChunkHandler?
+
+    private(set) var isRecording = false
+
+    init(
+        engine: AVAudioEngine = AVAudioEngine(),
+        accumulator: AudioSampleAccumulator = AudioSampleAccumulator()
+    ) {
+        self.engine = engine
+        self.accumulator = accumulator
+    }
+
+    func startRecording(onChunk: @escaping AudioChunkHandler) throws {
+        let inputNode = engine.inputNode
+        let inputFormat = inputNode.inputFormat(forBus: 0)
+
+        guard inputFormat.sampleRate > 0, inputFormat.channelCount > 0 else {
+            throw AudioRecordingError.noInputAvailable
+        }
+
+        guard let converter = AVAudioConverter(from: inputFormat, to: Self.targetFormat) else {
+            throw AudioRecordingError.converterCreationFailed
+        }
+
+        accumulator.clear()
+        let bufferSize = AVAudioFrameCount(max(1, Int(inputFormat.sampleRate * 0.1)))
+
+        stateLock.lock()
+        self.converter = converter
+        self.inputFormat = inputFormat
+        chunkHandler = onChunk
+        stateLock.unlock()
+
+        inputNode.removeTap(onBus: 0)
+        inputNode.installTap(onBus: 0, bufferSize: bufferSize, format: inputFormat) { [weak self] buffer, _ in
+            self?.process(buffer)
+        }
+
+        engine.prepare()
+        do {
+            try engine.start()
+        } catch {
+            inputNode.removeTap(onBus: 0)
+            clearTransientState()
+            throw error
+        }
+        isRecording = true
+    }
+
+    func stopRecording() async -> [Float] {
+        do {
+            try await Task.sleep(for: .milliseconds(200))
+        } catch {
+        }
+
+        engine.inputNode.removeTap(onBus: 0)
+        engine.stop()
+        isRecording = false
+
+        clearTransientState()
+
+        let samples = accumulator.snapshot()
+        logRecordingStats(samples)
+        return samples
+    }
+
+    private func process(_ inputBuffer: AVAudioPCMBuffer) {
+        let converter: AVAudioConverter
+        let inputFormat: AVAudioFormat
+        let chunkHandler: AudioChunkHandler?
+
+        stateLock.lock()
+        let activeConverter = self.converter
+        let activeInputFormat = self.inputFormat
+        chunkHandler = self.chunkHandler
+        stateLock.unlock()
+
+        guard let activeConverter, let activeInputFormat else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        converter = activeConverter
+        inputFormat = activeInputFormat
+
+        let outputFrameCapacity = AVAudioFrameCount(
+            Int(
+                Double(inputBuffer.frameLength) * Self.targetFormat.sampleRate / inputFormat.sampleRate
+            ) + 1
+        )
+
+        guard let outputBuffer = AVAudioPCMBuffer(
+            pcmFormat: Self.targetFormat,
+            frameCapacity: outputFrameCapacity
+        ) else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        let inputProviderState = InputProviderState()
+        var conversionError: NSError?
+        _ = converter.convert(to: outputBuffer, error: &conversionError) { _, status in
+            if inputProviderState.didProvideInput {
+                status.pointee = .noDataNow
+                return nil
+            }
+
+            inputProviderState.didProvideInput = true
+            status.pointee = .haveData
+            return inputBuffer
+        }
+
+        if let conversionError {
+            print("Audio conversion failed: \(conversionError.localizedDescription)")
+            return
+        }
+
+        guard let channelData = outputBuffer.floatChannelData?.pointee, outputBuffer.frameLength > 0 else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        let samples = Array(
+            UnsafeBufferPointer(
+                start: channelData,
+                count: Int(outputBuffer.frameLength)
+            )
+        )
+
+        accumulator.append(samples)
+        chunkHandler?(samples)
+    }
+
+    private func clearTransientState() {
+        stateLock.lock()
+        converter = nil
+        inputFormat = nil
+        chunkHandler = nil
+        stateLock.unlock()
+    }
+
+    private func logRecordingStats(_ samples: [Float]) {
+        guard !samples.isEmpty else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        let duration = Double(samples.count) / Self.targetFormat.sampleRate
+        let maxAmplitude = samples.map { abs($0) }.max() ?? 0
+        print(
+            "Recording stopped: \(samples.count) samples, \(duration)s, peak amplitude \(maxAmplitude)"
+        )
+    }
+}
+
+private final class InputProviderState: @unchecked Sendable {
+    var didProvideInput = false
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,228 @@
+import AppKit
+import SwiftUI
+
+enum OverlayMessage: Equatable {
+    case loadingModels
+    case recording
+    case transcribing
+    case cleaningUp
+    case copiedToClipboard
+    case noSoundDetected
+    case learnedCorrection(wrong: String, right: String)
+
+    var primaryText: String {
+        switch self {
+        case .loadingModels:
+            return "Loading models..."
+        case .recording:
+            return "Recording..."
+        case .transcribing:
+            return "Transcribing..."
+        case .cleaningUp:
+            return "Cleaning up..."
+        case .copiedToClipboard:
+            return "Copied to clipboard"
+        case .noSoundDetected:
+            return "No sound detected"
+        case .learnedCorrection:
+            return "Learned correction"
+        }
+    }
+
+    var secondaryText: String? {
+        switch self {
+        case .copiedToClipboard:
+            return "⌘V to paste"
+        case let .learnedCorrection(wrong, right):
+            return "\(wrong) -> \(right)"
+        case .loadingModels, .recording, .transcribing, .cleaningUp, .noSoundDetected:
+            return nil
+        }
+    }
+
+    var size: NSSize {
+        switch self {
+        case .copiedToClipboard, .learnedCorrection:
+            return NSSize(width: 420, height: 84)
+        case .loadingModels, .recording, .transcribing, .cleaningUp, .noSoundDetected:
+            return NSSize(width: 300, height: 60)
+        }
+    }
+
+    var autoDismissDelay: Duration? {
+        switch self {
+        case .copiedToClipboard, .noSoundDetected, .learnedCorrection:
+            return .seconds(3)
+        case .loadingModels, .recording, .transcribing, .cleaningUp:
+            return nil
+        }
+    }
+
+    fileprivate var indicatorStyle: OverlayIndicatorStyle {
+        switch self {
+        case .loadingModels:
+            return .spinner
+        case .recording:
+            return .dot(.systemRed)
+        case .transcribing, .cleaningUp, .copiedToClipboard:
+            return .dot(.systemBlue)
+        case .noSoundDetected:
+            return .dot(.systemOrange)
+        case .learnedCorrection:
+            return .checkmark
+        }
+    }
+}
+
+@MainActor
+protocol OverlayPresenting: AnyObject {
+    func show(_ message: OverlayMessage)
+    func dismiss()
+    func dismiss(ifShowing message: OverlayMessage)
+}
+
+@MainActor
+final class OverlayPresenter: OverlayPresenting {
+    private var panel: NSPanel?
+    private var hostingController: NSHostingController<OverlayContentView>?
+    private var dismissTask: Task<Void, Never>?
+    private var currentMessage: OverlayMessage?
+
+    func show(_ message: OverlayMessage) {
+        dismissTask?.cancel()
+        currentMessage = message
+
+        let panel = panel ?? makePanel()
+        let hostingController = hostingController ?? NSHostingController(rootView: OverlayContentView(message: message))
+
+        hostingController.rootView = OverlayContentView(message: message)
+        panel.contentViewController = hostingController
+        panel.setContentSize(message.size)
+        position(panel, size: message.size)
+        panel.orderFrontRegardless()
+
+        self.panel = panel
+        self.hostingController = hostingController
+
+        if let autoDismissDelay = message.autoDismissDelay {
+            dismissTask = Task { [weak self] in
+                try? await Task.sleep(for: autoDismissDelay)
+                await MainActor.run {
+                    self?.dismiss(ifShowing: message)
+                }
+            }
+        }
+    }
+
+    func dismiss() {
+        dismissTask?.cancel()
+        dismissTask = nil
+        currentMessage = nil
+        panel?.orderOut(nil)
+        panel = nil
+        hostingController = nil
+    }
+
+    func dismiss(ifShowing message: OverlayMessage) {
+        guard currentMessage == message else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        dismiss()
+    }
+
+    private func makePanel() -> NSPanel {
+        let panel = NSPanel(
+            contentRect: NSRect(origin: .zero, size: .zero),
+            styleMask: [.borderless, .nonactivatingPanel],
+            backing: .buffered,
+            defer: false
+        )
+        panel.isOpaque = false
+        panel.backgroundColor = .clear
+        panel.hasShadow = true
+        panel.level = .floating
+        panel.ignoresMouseEvents = true
+        panel.hidesOnDeactivate = false
+        panel.collectionBehavior = [.canJoinAllSpaces, .fullScreenAuxiliary]
+        return panel
+    }
+
+    private func position(_ panel: NSPanel, size: NSSize) {
+        let visibleFrame = NSScreen.main?.visibleFrame ?? .zero
+        let origin = NSPoint(
+            x: visibleFrame.midX - (size.width / 2),
+            y: visibleFrame.minY + 40
+        )
+        panel.setFrame(NSRect(origin: origin, size: size), display: true)
+    }
+}
+
+private enum OverlayIndicatorStyle {
+    case spinner
+    case dot(NSColor)
+    case checkmark
+}
+
+private struct OverlayContentView: View {
+    let message: OverlayMessage
+
+    var body: some View {
+        HStack(spacing: 10) {
+            OverlayIndicatorView(style: message.indicatorStyle)
+
+            VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 2) {
+                Text(message.primaryText)
+                    .font(.system(size: 13, weight: .semibold))
+                    .foregroundStyle(Color.white)
+
+                if let secondaryText = message.secondaryText {
+                    Text(secondaryText)
+                        .font(.system(size: 12, weight: .medium, design: .rounded))
+                        .foregroundStyle(Color.white.opacity(0.8))
+                        .lineLimit(2)
+                }
+            }
+
+            Spacer(minLength: 0)
+        }
+        .padding(.horizontal, 14)
+        .frame(width: message.size.width, height: message.size.height)
+        .background(
+            Capsule()
+                .fill(Color.black.opacity(0.85))
+        )
+    }
+}
+
+private struct OverlayIndicatorView: View {
+    let style: OverlayIndicatorStyle
+
+    @State private var isDimmed = false
+
+    var body: some View {
+        Group {
+            switch style {
+            case .spinner:
+                ProgressView()
+                    .progressViewStyle(.circular)
+                    .tint(.orange)
+            case let .dot(color):
+                Circle()
+                    .fill(Color(nsColor: color))
+                    .frame(width: 10, height: 10)
+                    .opacity(isDimmed ? 0.4 : 1.0)
+                    .onAppear {
+                        withAnimation(.easeInOut(duration: 0.6).repeatForever(autoreverses: true)) {
+                            isDimmed = true
+                        }
+                    }
+            case .checkmark:
+                Image(systemName: "checkmark.circle.fill")
+                    .foregroundStyle(.green)
+                    .font(.system(size: 16))
+            }
+        }
+        .frame(width: 18, height: 18)
+    }
+}

@@ -2,6 +2,243 @@ import XCTest
 @testable import GhostPepper
 
 final class AppControllerTests: XCTestCase {
+    @MainActor
+    func testStartRecordingAcquiresPipelineAndShowsRecordingFeedback() async {
+        let settings = SettingsStore(userDefaults: makeUserDefaults())
+        let loader = AppControllerSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        let hotkeyMonitor = AppControllerHotkeyMonitor()
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            loader: loader
+        )
+        let recorder = AppControllerAudioRecorder()
+        let transcriber = AppControllerSpeechTranscriber()
+        let clipboard = AppControllerClipboardWriter()
+        let overlay = AppControllerOverlayPresenter()
+        let sounds = AppControllerSoundPlayer()
+        let pipelineGate = PipelineGate()
+        let traceBuilder = AppControllerTraceBuilder()
+        let controller = AppController(
+            settingsStore: settings,
+            speechModelManager: manager,
+            hotkeyMonitor: hotkeyMonitor,
+            pipelineGate: pipelineGate,
+            audioRecorder: recorder,
+            speechTranscriber: transcriber,
+            clipboardWriter: clipboard,
+            overlayPresenter: overlay,
+            soundPlayer: sounds,
+            traceBuilder: traceBuilder
+        )
+
+        await controller.start()
+        await hotkeyMonitor.emit(.start(.pushToTalk))
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(controller.status, .recording)
+        XCTAssertEqual(recorder.startCallCount, 1)
+        XCTAssertEqual(overlay.events, [.show(.recording)])
+        XCTAssertEqual(sounds.effects, [.startRecording])
+        XCTAssertEqual(pipelineGate.currentOwner, .liveRecording)
+        XCTAssertEqual(clipboard.writes, [])
+        XCTAssertEqual(traceBuilder.lastTrace?.events, [.microphoneLive])
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testStopRecordingTranscribesCopiesToClipboardAndReturnsReady() async {
+        let settings = SettingsStore(userDefaults: makeUserDefaults())
+        let loader = AppControllerSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        let hotkeyMonitor = AppControllerHotkeyMonitor()
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            loader: loader
+        )
+        let recorder = AppControllerAudioRecorder()
+        recorder.samplesToReturn = [0.2, -0.1, 0.4]
+        let transcriber = AppControllerSpeechTranscriber()
+        transcriber.result = "transcribed text"
+        let clipboard = AppControllerClipboardWriter()
+        let overlay = AppControllerOverlayPresenter()
+        let sounds = AppControllerSoundPlayer()
+        let pipelineGate = PipelineGate()
+        let traceBuilder = AppControllerTraceBuilder()
+        let controller = AppController(
+            settingsStore: settings,
+            speechModelManager: manager,
+            hotkeyMonitor: hotkeyMonitor,
+            pipelineGate: pipelineGate,
+            audioRecorder: recorder,
+            speechTranscriber: transcriber,
+            clipboardWriter: clipboard,
+            overlayPresenter: overlay,
+            soundPlayer: sounds,
+            traceBuilder: traceBuilder
+        )
+
+        await controller.start()
+        await hotkeyMonitor.emit(.start(.pushToTalk))
+        await hotkeyMonitor.emit(.stop)
+        await waitUntil {
+            controller.status == .ready && clipboard.writes == ["transcribed text"]
+        }
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(recorder.stopCallCount, 1)
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            transcriber.calls,
+            [.init(samples: [0.2, -0.1, 0.4], modelID: SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id)]
+        )
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            overlay.events,
+            [.show(.recording), .show(.transcribing), .show(.copiedToClipboard)]
+        )
+        XCTAssertEqual(sounds.effects, [.startRecording, .stopRecording])
+        XCTAssertEqual(pipelineGate.currentOwner, nil)
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            traceBuilder.lastTrace?.events,
+            [.microphoneLive, .hotkeyLifted, .microphoneCold, .transcriptionStart, .pasteEnd]
+        )
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testStopRecordingWithNoTranscriptDismissesOverlayAndSkipsClipboardWrite() async {
+        let settings = SettingsStore(userDefaults: makeUserDefaults())
+        let loader = AppControllerSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        let hotkeyMonitor = AppControllerHotkeyMonitor()
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            loader: loader
+        )
+        let recorder = AppControllerAudioRecorder()
+        recorder.samplesToReturn = [0.2, -0.1, 0.4]
+        let transcriber = AppControllerSpeechTranscriber()
+        transcriber.result = nil
+        let clipboard = AppControllerClipboardWriter()
+        let overlay = AppControllerOverlayPresenter()
+        let sounds = AppControllerSoundPlayer()
+        let pipelineGate = PipelineGate()
+        let traceBuilder = AppControllerTraceBuilder()
+        let controller = AppController(
+            settingsStore: settings,
+            speechModelManager: manager,
+            hotkeyMonitor: hotkeyMonitor,
+            pipelineGate: pipelineGate,
+            audioRecorder: recorder,
+            speechTranscriber: transcriber,
+            clipboardWriter: clipboard,
+            overlayPresenter: overlay,
+            soundPlayer: sounds,
+            traceBuilder: traceBuilder
+        )
+
+        await controller.start()
+        await hotkeyMonitor.emit(.start(.pushToTalk))
+        await hotkeyMonitor.emit(.stop)
+        await waitUntil {
+            controller.status == .ready && overlay.events.last == .dismiss
+        }
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(clipboard.writes, [])
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            overlay.events,
+            [.show(.recording), .show(.transcribing), .dismiss]
+        )
+        XCTAssertEqual(pipelineGate.currentOwner, nil)
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            traceBuilder.lastTrace?.events,
+            [.microphoneLive, .hotkeyLifted, .microphoneCold, .transcriptionStart]
+        )
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testStartRecordingSkipsWhenPipelineIsBusy() async {
+        let settings = SettingsStore(userDefaults: makeUserDefaults())
+        let loader = AppControllerSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        let hotkeyMonitor = AppControllerHotkeyMonitor()
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            loader: loader
+        )
+        let recorder = AppControllerAudioRecorder()
+        let transcriber = AppControllerSpeechTranscriber()
+        let clipboard = AppControllerClipboardWriter()
+        let overlay = AppControllerOverlayPresenter()
+        let sounds = AppControllerSoundPlayer()
+        let pipelineGate = PipelineGate()
+        let traceBuilder = AppControllerTraceBuilder()
+        _ = pipelineGate.acquire(.transcriptionLab)
+        let controller = AppController(
+            settingsStore: settings,

+    @MainActor
+    func testRecordingFeedbackSkipsSoundsWhenDisabled() async {
+        let settings = SettingsStore(userDefaults: makeUserDefaults())
+        settings.playSounds = false
+        let loader = AppControllerSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        let hotkeyMonitor = AppControllerHotkeyMonitor()
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            loader: loader
+        )
+        let recorder = AppControllerAudioRecorder()
+        recorder.samplesToReturn = [0.2, -0.1, 0.4]
+        let transcriber = AppControllerSpeechTranscriber()
+        transcriber.result = "transcribed text"
+        let clipboard = AppControllerClipboardWriter()
+        let overlay = AppControllerOverlayPresenter()
+        let sounds = AppControllerSoundPlayer()
+        let traceBuilder = AppControllerTraceBuilder()
+        let controller = AppController(
+            settingsStore: settings,
+            speechModelManager: manager,
+            hotkeyMonitor: hotkeyMonitor,
+            audioRecorder: recorder,
+            speechTranscriber: transcriber,
+            clipboardWriter: clipboard,
+            overlayPresenter: overlay,
+            soundPlayer: sounds,
+            traceBuilder: traceBuilder
+        )
+
+        await controller.start()
+        await hotkeyMonitor.emit(.start(.pushToTalk))
+        await hotkeyMonitor.emit(.stop)
+        await waitUntil {
+            controller.status == .ready && clipboard.writes == ["transcribed text"]
+        }
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(sounds.effects, [])
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            traceBuilder.lastTrace?.events,
+            [.microphoneLive, .hotkeyLifted, .microphoneCold, .transcriptionStart, .pasteEnd]
+        )
+    }

+    @MainActor
+    private func waitUntil(
+        timeout: Duration = .seconds(1),
+        condition: @escaping @MainActor () -> Bool
+    ) async {
+        let deadline = ContinuousClock.now + timeout
+        while !condition() {
+            XCTAssertLessThan(ContinuousClock.now, deadline)
+            await Task.yield()
+        }
+    }
+
     private func makeUserDefaults() -> UserDefaults {
         let suiteName = "AppControllerTests-\(UUID().uuidString)"
         let userDefaults = UserDefaults(suiteName: suiteName)!
@@ -110,6 +359,7 @@ private final class AppControllerHotkeyMonitor: HotkeyMonitoring {
     private(set) var startedBindings: [HotkeyBindings] = []
     var startError: Error?
     var isRunning = false
+    private var effectHandler: HotkeyEffectHandler?
 
     func start(bindings: HotkeyBindings, effectHandler: @escaping HotkeyEffectHandler) throws {
         if let startError {
@@ -118,9 +368,135 @@ private final class AppControllerHotkeyMonitor: HotkeyMonitoring {
 
         startedBindings.append(bindings)
         isRunning = true
+        self.effectHandler = effectHandler
     }
 
     func stop() {
         isRunning = false
+        effectHandler = nil
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func emit(_ effect: HotkeyEffect) async {
+        effectHandler?(effect)
+        await Task.yield()
+    }
+}
+
+private final class AppControllerAudioRecorder: AudioRecording, @unchecked Sendable {
+    var isRecording = false
+    var startCallCount = 0
+    var stopCallCount = 0
+    var samplesToReturn: [Float] = []
+
+    func startRecording(onChunk: @escaping @Sendable ([Float]) -> Void) throws {
+        _ = onChunk
+        startCallCount += 1
+        isRecording = true
+    }
+
+    func stopRecording() async -> [Float] {
+        stopCallCount += 1
+        isRecording = false
+        return samplesToReturn
+    }
+}
+
+private final class AppControllerSpeechTranscriber: SpeechTranscribing, @unchecked Sendable {
+    struct Call: Equatable {
+        let samples: [Float]
+        let modelID: String
+    }
+
+    var result: String?
+    private(set) var calls: [Call] = []
+
+    func transcribe(samples: [Float], modelID: String?) async -> String? {
+        calls.append(Call(samples: samples, modelID: modelID ?? ""))
+        return result
+    }
+}
+
+private final class AppControllerClipboardWriter: ClipboardWriting {
+    private(set) var writes: [String] = []
+
+    func write(_ string: String) {
+        writes.append(string)
+    }
+}
+
+private final class AppControllerOverlayPresenter: OverlayPresenting {
+    enum Event: Equatable {
+        case show(OverlayMessage)
+        case dismiss
+    }
+
+    private(set) var events: [Event] = []
+
+    func show(_ message: OverlayMessage) {
+        events.append(.show(message))
+    }
+
+    func dismiss() {
+        events.append(.dismiss)
+    }
+
+    func dismiss(ifShowing message: OverlayMessage) {
+        _ = message
+    }
+}
+
+private final class AppControllerSoundPlayer: SoundEffectPlaying {
+    private(set) var effects: [SoundEffect] = []
+
+    func play(_ effect: SoundEffect) {
+        effects.append(effect)
+    }
+}
+
+private final class AppControllerTraceBuilder: DictationSessionTraceBuilding {
+    private(set) var lastTrace: AppControllerTrace?
+
+    func makeTrace() -> any DictationSessionTracing {
+        let trace = AppControllerTrace()
+        lastTrace = trace
+        return trace
+    }
+}
+
+private final class AppControllerTrace: DictationSessionTracing {
+    enum Event: Equatable {
+        case microphoneLive
+        case hotkeyLifted
+        case microphoneCold
+        case transcriptionStart
+        case pasteEnd
+        case abandoned
+    }
+
+    private(set) var events: [Event] = []
+
+    func markMicrophoneLive() {
+        events.append(.microphoneLive)
+    }
+
+    func markMicrophoneCold() {
+        events.append(.microphoneCold)
+    }
+
+    func markHotkeyLifted() {
+        events.append(.hotkeyLifted)
+    }
+
+    func markTranscriptionStart() {
+        events.append(.transcriptionStart)
+    }
+
+    func markPasteEnd() {
+        events.append(.pasteEnd)
+    }
+
+    func abandon() {
+        events.append(.abandoned)
     }
 }

@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class AudioSampleAccumulatorTests: XCTestCase {
+    func testAppendIgnoresEmptyChunks() {
+        let accumulator = AudioSampleAccumulator()
+
+        accumulator.append([])
+        accumulator.append([0.25, -0.5])
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(accumulator.snapshot(), [0.25, -0.5])
+    }
+
+    func testClearResetsAccumulatedSamples() {
+        let accumulator = AudioSampleAccumulator()
+
+        accumulator.append([0.25, -0.5])
+        accumulator.clear()
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(accumulator.snapshot(), [])
+    }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class OverlayMessageTests: XCTestCase {
+    func testRecordingMessageUsesExpectedCopyAndSize() {
+        XCTAssertEqual(OverlayMessage.recording.primaryText, "Recording...")
+        XCTAssertNil(OverlayMessage.recording.secondaryText)
+        XCTAssertEqual(OverlayMessage.recording.size.width, 300)
+        XCTAssertEqual(OverlayMessage.recording.size.height, 60)
+        XCTAssertNil(OverlayMessage.recording.autoDismissDelay)
+    }
+
+    func testClipboardFallbackMessageUsesExpectedCopyAndDismissal() {
+        XCTAssertEqual(OverlayMessage.copiedToClipboard.primaryText, "Copied to clipboard")
+        XCTAssertEqual(OverlayMessage.copiedToClipboard.secondaryText, "⌘V to paste")
+        XCTAssertEqual(OverlayMessage.copiedToClipboard.size.width, 420)
+        XCTAssertEqual(OverlayMessage.copiedToClipboard.size.height, 84)
+        XCTAssertEqual(OverlayMessage.copiedToClipboard.autoDismissDelay, .seconds(3))
+    }
+
+    func testLearnedCorrectionMessageIncludesReplacementText() {
+        let message = OverlayMessage.learnedCorrection(wrong: "foo", right: "bar")
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(message.primaryText, "Learned correction")
+        XCTAssertEqual(message.secondaryText, "foo -> bar")
+    }
+}

+# Iteration Log
+
+## ITER-0000
+
+**Completed:** 2026-04-09
+**Stories delivered:** STORY-0036, STORY-0060, STORY-0062, STORY-0073, STORY-0090, STORY-0091, STORY-0093, STORY-0120, STORY-0121, STORY-0156, STORY-0157, STORY-0163, STORY-0176, STORY-0178, STORY-0180, STORY-0181, STORY-0186, STORY-0245, STORY-0250, STORY-0253, STORY-0254, STORY-0400, STORY-0401, STORY-0405, STORY-0406, STORY-0601, STORY-0612, STORY-0613, STORY-0614, STORY-0615, STORY-0616, STORY-0617, STORY-0619, STORY-0646, STORY-0648, STORY-0651, STORY-0652, STORY-0653
+**Tasks executed:**
+- Scaffolded the XcodeGen-generated menu bar app and hosted test bundle.
+- Bootstrapped speech-model loading and shared Whisper runtime wiring for the single supported Whisper path.
+- Wired the hotkey monitor into live recording, transcription, clipboard fallback delivery, overlay feedback, sound effects, and session tracing.
+- Added controller, transcriber, loader, overlay metadata, and audio-accumulator coverage and regenerated the Xcode project from `project.yml`.
+**Summary:** Delivered the walking skeleton as a working local dictation loop: the app boots as a menu bar utility, loads the configured Whisper model, records from the global hotkey, transcribes locally, copies the result to the clipboard with visible feedback, and returns to ready for the next session. During wrap-up, STORY-0034 was moved to ITER-0002 because its full live permission/settings reconfiguration scope exceeds the thinnest end-to-end skeleton.
